top_signals.title: Stocks Bounce on Manufacturing, Warsh’s Remarks
top_signals.summary:
Signs of economic strength alongside easing price pressures spurred a bounce in stocks from session lows, with Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh saying inflation risks have come down.
Jordan Jackson, Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, gives his macro call and discusses the market reaction he expects to see from Thursday's jobs data. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Oil Falls as US-Iran Talks Progress, Supplies Beat Expectations
top_signals.summary: Oil extended its run of declines as traders monitored US-Iran peace talks, and weekly storage data showed American stockpiles fell by less than anticipated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The next Iran war may come sooner than you think - Reuters
top_signals.summary: The next Iran war may come sooner than you think  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU launches connectivity and communities support programmes for peace in the South Caucasus
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Baku, 01 Jul 2026 Today in Baku, European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen, together with Commissioner for Enlargement Marta Kos, met with the President of Azerbaijan Ilham Aliyev to discuss ways to foster peace in the region through greater connectivity and support to border communities. They also discussed bilateral EU-Azerbaijan trade and energy partnerships.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
